_meta.format: Anthropic two-prompt harness JSON ledger (Nov 2025 pattern)
_meta.purpose: Atomic feature ledger for the 21-day Atelier sprint. Coding agent picks next unblocked unstarted feature, runs end-to-end test before touching the next. JSON not Markdown so Claude is less likely to silently rewrite.
_meta.completion_metric: passes: true on all P0 features by 2026-06-03
_meta.see_also: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-14-atelier-sprint-plan.md for day-by-day TDD bite-sized tasks per feature
_meta.audit_addendum: 2026-05-15 audit: +22 features for ADR 0011 WRAI (N14) + ADR 0012 Anchor Discipline + ADR 0013 Conditional Axis Weighting (N15). See audit/audit-plan.md for bucket mapping.

features.title: TrajectoryRecorder full failure-trichotomy (self-heal + fail-soft)
features.notes: Phase-1 ships fail-loud-only. Add tenacity retry decorator (3 attempts, exp backoff on 503/429) for self-heal. Separate partial-batch errors from full-batch failures for fail-soft. Per audit Run 2 P1-3.

features.title: OTel collector conditional Phoenix/GCloud routing by ATELIER_OBSERVABILITY_MODE
features.notes: Phase-1 collector always emits to both Phoenix and GCloud. Phase-2: when mode=prod, suppress otlp/phoenix exporter; when mode=dev, suppress googlecloud exporter. Per audit Run 2 P1-4.
